topics.description: Opens main user documentation.

topics.title: Configure Band Plan
topics.description: Submenu: radio buttons Off, Small (6pt), Medium (10pt), Large (12pt), Huge (16pt), then region selector.

topics.title: Configure UI Scale
topics.description: Submenu: radio buttons 75%, 85%, 100%, 110%, 125%, 150%, 175%, 200% plus Zoom In (Ctrl+=), Zoom Out (Ctrl+-), Reset (Ctrl+0).

topics.title: Configuring AetherSDR Controls
topics.description: Opens guide for customizing applets, shortcuts, and MIDI mappings.

topics.title: Configuring Data Modes
topics.description: Opens guide for setting up digital mode operation.

topics.title: Contributing to AetherSDR
topics.description: Opens guide for contributing code, bug reports, and feature requests.

topics.title: Enable Applet Panel
topics.description: Checkable; toggles visibility of the right-side applet panel.

topics.title: Enable Blink Status Indicator
topics.description: Checkable (default on); title bar indicator blinks to signal radio heartbeat.

topics.title: Enable Frameless Window
topics.description: Checkable; hides OS window decoration to save screen space.

topics.title: Enable Inhibit during TUNE
topics.description: Submenu with checkboxes: None, ACC TX, TX1, TX2, TX3 — select which TX outputs to suppress during tuning.

topics.title: Enable Keyboard Shortcuts
topics.description: Checkable; enable/disable keyboard shortcut processing (e.g. arrow keys on sliders).

topics.title: Enable Minimal Mode
topics.description: Checkable; hides title bar and controls to maximize panadapter area.

topics.title: Enable Pan Follows VFO
topics.description: Checkable (default on); when enabled, panadapter pans to keep VFO visible.

topics.title: Enable Pop Out Applet Panel
topics.description: Checkable; floats the applet panel into separate window or docks it back.

topics.title: Enable Propagation Conditions
topics.description: Checkable; displays real-time ionospheric propagation forecast overlay on panadapters.

topics.title: Enable Single-Click to Tune
topics.description: Checkable; when enabled, click panadapter to retune (default: double-click required).

topics.title: Enable autostart for CAT with AetherSDR
topics.description: Checkable menu item; creates virtual serial ports for CAT control (Linux/macOS; AppSettings: AutoStartCAT).

topics.title: Enable autostart for DAX with AetherSDR
topics.description: Checkable menu item; enables DAX audio bridge on startup (macOS/PipeWire; AppSettings: AutoStartDAX).

topics.title: Enable autostart for TCI with AetherSDR
topics.description: Checkable menu item; starts TCI server on launch (AppSettings: AutoStartTCI).

topics.title: Enable autostart for rigctld with AetherSDR
topics.description: Checkable menu item; spawns rigctld CAT server on startup (AppSettings: AutoStartRigctld).

topics.title: FlexControl
topics.description: Opens serial port configuration for FlexControl hardware interface.

topics.title: Getting Started
topics.description: Opens beginner guide to connecting and using AetherSDR.

topics.title: Import/Export Profiles
topics.description: Opens import/export dialog for profile backup and sharing (not yet implemented).

topics.title: Quit
topics.description: Closes the application.

topics.title: Reset Applet Order
topics.description: Restores applet panel to default order.

topics.title: USB Cables
topics.description: Opens USB cable assignment configuration for CAT and audio.

topics.title: Understanding Noise Cancellation
topics.description: Opens guide explaining NR2, NR4, DFNR, and MNR noise reduction.

topics.title: Full AppSettings key reference
Diagnose audio underruns and jitter
